name: Karakuri Watchdog mdl 313 "Saizan"
name_jp: カラクリ<ruby lang="jp"><rb>守</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>しゅ</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby><ruby lang="jp"><rb>衛</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>えい</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby> <ruby lang="jp"><rb>参</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>サ</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby><ruby lang="jp"><rb>壱</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>イ</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby><ruby lang="jp"><rb>参</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>ザン</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby>
desc: This card must attack if able. When this face-up card is selected as an attack target, change its battle position. When you take Battle Damage from a battle involving this card, all face-up "Karakuri" monsters you control gain 800 ATK and DEF until the End Phase. While this card is in face-up Attack Position, it cannot be destroyed by battle.
flavor: This card must attack if able. When this face-up card is selected as an attack target, change its battle position. When you take Battle Damage from a battle involving this card, all face-up "Karakuri" monsters you control gain 800 ATK and DEF until the End Phase. action: Activates if you take battle damage
